UserPromptSubmit.command: node -e "const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(!r){console.error('[rad-orc-vscode] CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT not injected — plugin not detected as Claude format. process.env keys:',Object.keys(process.env).filter(k=>/PLUGIN|COPILOT|CLAUDE|VSCODE/i.test(k)).join(','));process.exit(2)}const n=process.platform==='win32'&&r[0]==='/'&&r[2]==='/'?r[1].toUpperCase()+':'+r.slice(2):r;import('node:url').then(u=>import(u.pathToFileURL(n+'/hooks/bootstrap.mjs').href))"

SessionStart.command: node -e "const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(!r){console.error('[rad-orc-vscode] CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT not injected — plugin not detected as Claude format. process.env keys:',Object.keys(process.env).filter(k=>/PLUGIN|COPILOT|CLAUDE|VSCODE/i.test(k)).join(','));process.exit(2)}const n=process.platform==='win32'&&r[0]==='/'&&r[2]==='/'?r[1].toUpperCase()+':'+r.slice(2):r;import('node:url').then(u=>import(u.pathToFileURL(n+'/hooks/drift-check.mjs').href))"
